_comment: Address labels used to exclude non-circulating balances from holder-concentration math: pools, lockers, bridges, vesting contracts, burn addresses, known CEX custody. Wrong labels are the biggest source of concentration false positives, so additions require a human-reviewed PR with evidence. The scanner also auto-labels: any address that is a contract AND is the token's own pool (from DexScreener) is excluded automatically.

0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.label: base-l2-standard-bridge
0x42000000000000000000000000000000000000.evidence: OP-stack predeploys specification (github.com/ethereum-optimism/specs): L2StandardBridge predeploy, identical address on every OP-stack chain
